Added: ◆  ROLE SUMMARY; ──────────────────────────────────────────────; ◆  KEY RESPONSIBILITIES... | Removed: ## Role Summary; ## Key Responsibilities; * Lead the implementation and maintenance of quality management systems, including ISO 9001 and SA8000, to ensure compliance with international standards...

Added: ◆  ROLE SUMMARY; ──────────────────────────────────────────────; You will own the quality management process for Arvind Limited's textile manufacturing operations, working closely with internal teams, external vendors, and business stakeholders to drive high-quality products that meet customer requirements. As a QA Manager, you will be responsible for managing inline and final inspection processes, conducting customer audits, and reporting quality KPIs to senior management. Your work will have a direct impact on the company's ability to deliver high-quality products to global buyers, ensuring compliance with international quality standards such as ISO 9001 and SA8000. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams, including production, supply chain, and sales, to identify and implement process improvements that enhance product quality.... | Removed: ## Role Summary; You will own the quality management process for Arvind Limited's textile manufacturing operations, working closely with internal teams, external vendors, and business stakeholders to drive high-quality products that meet customer requirements. As a QA Manager, you will be responsible for managing inline and final inspection processes, conducting customer audits, and reporting quality KPIs to senior management. Your work will have a direct impact on the company's ability to deliver high-quality products to global buyers, ensuring compliance with international quality standards such as ISO 9001 and SA8000. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams, including production, supply chain, and sales, to identify and implement process improvements that enhance product quality.; ## Key Responsibilities...
